entry.title: 树的两种遍历
entry.content:
二叉树的递归遍历没写~~

N叉树的前序遍历（迭代）

class Solution {
    public List<Integer> preorder(Node root) {

        Stack<Node> stack = new Stack<>();
        List<Integer> res = new ArrayList<>();
        if(root == null){
            return res;
        }
        
        stack.push(root);
        while(!stack.isEmpty()){
            Node temp = stack.pop();
            res.add(temp.val);
            // 把子节点逆序入栈
            Collections.reverse(temp.children);
            for(Node node:temp.children){
                stack.push(node);
            }
        }

        return res;

    }
}

N叉树的前序遍历（dfs）

class Node {
    public int val;
    public List<Node> children;

    public Node() {}

    public Node(int _val) {
        val = _val;
    }

    public Node(int _val, List<Node> _children) {
        val = _val;
        children = _children;
    }
}

class Solution {
    List<Integer> res = new ArrayList<>();
    public List<Integer> postorder(Node root) {
        dfs(root);
        return res;

    }
    public void dfs(Node root){
        if(root == null){
            return;
        }
        for(Node n:root.children){
            dfs(n);
        }
        res.add(root.val);
    }
}

N叉树的后序遍历（迭代）

class Node {
    public int val;
    public List<Node> children;

    public Node() {}

    public Node(int _val) {
        val = _val;
    }

    public Node(int _val, List<Node> _children) {
        val = _val;
        children = _children;
    }
}

class Solution {
    List<Integer> res = new ArrayList<>();
    public List<Integer> postorder(Node root) {
        if(root == null){
            return res;
        }
        method(root);
        Collections.reverse(res);
        return res;

    }
    // 迭代
    public void method(Node root){
        Stack<Node> stack = new Stack<>();
        stack.push(root);
        while(!stack.isEmpty()){
            Node temp = stack.pop();
            res.add(temp.val);
            for(Node n:temp.children){
                stack.push(n);
            }
        }
    }
}

N叉树的后序遍历（dfs）

class Node {
    public int val;
    public List<Node> children;

    public Node() {}

    public Node(int _val) {
        val = _val;
    }

    public Node(int _val, List<Node> _children) {
        val = _val;
        children = _children;
    }
}

class Solution {
    List<Integer> res = new ArrayList<>();
    public List<Integer> postorder(Node root) {
        if(root == null){
            return res;
        }
        method(root);
        Collections.reverse(res);
        return res;

    }

    // 递归
    public void dfs(Node root){
        if(root == null){
            return;
        }
        for(Node n:root.children){
            dfs(n);
        }
        res.add(root.val);
    }
 
}

二叉树的前序遍历（迭代）

 public class TreeNode {
      int val;
      TreeNode left;
      TreeNode right;
      TreeNode(int x) { val = x; }
 }
class Solution {
    List<Integer> res = new ArrayList<>();
    public List<Integer> preorderTraversal(TreeNode root) {
        Stack<TreeNode> stack = new Stack<>();
        if(root == null){
            return res;
        }
        stack.push(root);
        while(!stack.isEmpty()){
            TreeNode node = stack.pop();
            res.add(node.val);
            if(node.right != null){
                stack.push(node.right);
            }
            if(node.left != null){
                stack.push(node.left);
            }
        }
        return res;
    }
}

二叉树的中序遍历（迭代）

class Solution {
    public List<Integer> inorderTraversal(TreeNode root) {
        List<Integer> list = new ArrayList<>();
        Stack<TreeNode> stack = new Stack<>();
        if(root == null){
            return list;
        }
        TreeNode node = root;
        while(!stack.isEmpty() || node != null){

            // 中序遍历左中右
            // 先把左子树节入栈
            while(node != null){
                stack.push(node);
                node = node.left;
            }

            TreeNode temp = stack.pop();
            // 中
            list.add(temp.val);
            // 右
            node = temp.right;

        }
        return list;
    }
}

二叉树的后序遍历迭代

public List<Integer> postorderTraversal(TreeNode root) {
        LinkedList<Integer> result = new LinkedList<>();
        Stack<TreeNode> stack = new Stack<>();
        while (root != null || !stack.isEmpty()) {
            if (root != null) {
                stack.push(root);
                result.addFirst(root.val);
                root = root.right;
            } else {
                root = stack.pop();
                root = root.left;
            }
        }
        return result;
    }

我自己的另一种实现是根据先序遍历（修改过）然后逆序比如：先序遍历是中左右我修改成中右左然后再把遍历的集合逆序就是后序遍历的左右中了

class Solution {
    public List<Integer> postorderTraversal(TreeNode root) {
        List<Integer> res = new ArrayList<>();
        Stack<TreeNode> stack = new Stack<>();
        if(root == null){
            return res;
        }
        stack.push(root);
        // 中右左遍历
        while(!stack.isEmpty()){
            TreeNode node = stack.pop();
            res.add(node.val);
            if(node.left != null){
                stack.push(node.left);
            }
            if(node.right != null){
                stack.push(node.right);
            }
        }
        // 然后逆序成左右中
        Collections.reverse(res);
        return res;
    }
}

entry.title: 滑动窗口
entry.content:
一、替换后的最长重复字符

leetcode-424

题解分析：别人的思路

class Solution {
    // 最初没把题目看清楚，以为只有A和B字符
    char[] map = new char[26];
    public int characterReplacement(String s, int k) {
        if(s == null){
            return 0;
        }
        char[] chars = s.toCharArray();
        int left = 0;
        int right = 0;
        int maxChars = 0;
        for(right = 0;right < chars.length;right++){
            // right坐在位置的下标
            int index = chars[right] - 'A';
            map[index]++;
            maxChars = Math.max(maxChars,map[index]);
            // 不满足条件-1，左边界+1
            if(right - left + 1 > maxChars + k){
                int left_index = chars[left] - 'A';
                map[left_index]--;
                left++;
            }
        }
        return chars.length - left;
    }
}

二、乘积小于k的连续的子数组的个数。

leetcode-713

class Solution {
    public int numSubarrayProductLessThanK(int[] nums, int k) {
        int count = 0;
        int left = 0;
        int help = 1;
        /*
         *  这里需要注意的是，比如10，5，2中符合的子数组为 [10],[5],[2],[10,5],[5,2],但是没有[10,2]，必须要保证连续
         *  窗口中的数乘积小于k时，符合条件的子数组的个数就为right - left + 1
         *  比如例子中[10, 5, 2, 6]，初始情况窗口中只有10，所以times+1，之后窗口中加上了5，变成[10,5],其中连续子数组有：{{10},{5},           *  {10,5}}，之前的10已经加过了，因此每次加进去的连续子数组是以当前right对应的数为首的连续子数组，再以[10,5,2]，以2为首就是{2,         *  25,2510},对应为right-left+1。
         */
        for(int right = 0;right < nums.length;right++){
            help *= nums[right];
            while(help >= k && left <= right){
                // 新加入元素是的乘积>100时,窗口向右移动
                help = help / nums[left];
                left++;
            }
            count += right - left + 1;
        }
        return count;
    }
}

三、最大连续1的个数III

leetcode-1004

这道题的思路和424题基本一样，只不过要注意的是这道题只能把o变成1，而不能把1变成0，因此我们统计窗口中字符最大个数只能统计1的个数，而不能统计0的个数，体现在代码中的就是 maxNum = Math.max(maxNum,map[1]);直接把map[1]写死

class Solution {
    int[] map = new int[]{0,0};
    public int longestOnes(int[] A, int K) {
        int left = 0;
        int maxNum = 0;
        for(int right = 0;right < A.length;right++){
            if(A[right] == 0){
                map[0] += 1;
            }else{
                map[1] += 1;
            }
            maxNum = Math.max(maxNum,map[1]);
            if(right - left + 1 > maxNum + K){
                map[A[left]]--;
                left++;
            }
        }
        return A.length - left;
    }
}

entry.title: 岛屿问题
entry.content:
一、岛屿的周长

leetcode-463 岛屿的周长

class Solution {
    public int islandPerimeter(int[][] grid) {
        int sum = 0;
        for(int i = 0;i < grid.length;i++){
            for(int  j = 0;j < grid[0].length;j++){
                if(grid[i][j] == 1){{
                    sum += dfs(grid,i,j);
                }}
            }
        }
        return sum;
    }

    public int dfs(int[][] grid,int r,int c){
        // 遍历到陆地外面（越界）会产生一条边
        if(!isArea(grid,r,c)){
            return 1;
        }
        // 遍历到水域会产生一条边
        if(grid[r][c] == 0){
            return 1;
        }
        // 遍历到已经遍历过的陆地不会产生边
        if(grid[r][c] != 1){
            return 0;
        }
        grid[r][c] = 2;

        return dfs(grid,r-1,c) + dfs(grid,r+1,c) + dfs(grid,r,c-1) + dfs(grid,r,c+1);
    }

    public boolean isArea(int[][] grid,int r,int c){
        return r >= 0 && r < grid.length && c >= 0 && c < grid[0].length;
    }


}

二、岛屿的最大面积

leetcode-463 岛屿的最大面积

class Solution {
    public int maxAreaOfIsland(int[][] grid) {
        int count = 0;
        for(int i = 0;i < grid.length;i++){
            for(int j = 0;j < grid[0].length;j++){
                if(grid[i][j] == 1){
                    int temp = dfs(grid,i,j);
                    count = count > temp ? count : temp;
                }
            }
        }
        return count;
    }

    public int dfs(int[][] grid,int r,int c){
        // 出界
        if(!isArea(grid,r,c)){
            return 0;
        }
        // 遇到水域
        if(grid[r][c] != 1){
            return 0;
        }
        // 设置当前位置已经被访问过
        grid[r][c] = 2;

        return dfs(grid,r-1,c) + dfs(grid,r+1,c) + dfs(grid,r,c - 1) + dfs(grid,r,c + 1) + 1;

    }
    // 判断当前位置是否出界
    public boolean isArea(int[][] grid,int r,int c){
        return r >= 0 && r < grid.length && c >= 0 && c < grid[0].length;
    }

}

三、统计封闭岛屿的数目

leetcode-463 岛屿的最大面积

思路：封闭岛屿说明不能走到边缘

class Solution {
    public int closedIsland(int[][] grid) {
        int count = 0;
        for(int i = 0;i < grid.length;i++){
            for(int j = 0;j < grid[i].length;j++){
                if(grid[i][j] == 0){
                    if(dfs(grid,i,j)){
                        count++;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        return count;
    }

    public boolean dfs(int grid[][],int r,int c){
        // 如果接触到边界说明不是岛屿
        if(!isArea(grid,r,c)){
            return false;
        }

        if(grid[r][c] != 0){
            return true;
        }

        grid[r][c] = 2;

        boolean flage1 = dfs(grid,r-1,c);
        boolean flage2 = dfs(grid,r+1,c);
        boolean flage3 = dfs(grid,r,c+1);
        boolean flage4 = dfs(grid,r,c-1);

        return flage1 && flage2 && flage3 && flage4;
    }

    public boolean isArea(int[][] grid,int r,int c){
        return r >= 0 && r < grid.length && c >= 0 && c < grid[0].length;
    }
}

entry.title: 树的遍历
entry.content:
N叉树的前序遍历（迭代）

class Solution {
    public List<Integer> preorder(Node root) {

        Stack<Node> stack = new Stack<>();
        List<Integer> res = new ArrayList<>();
        if(root == null){
            return res;
        }
        
        stack.push(root);
        while(!stack.isEmpty()){
            Node temp = stack.pop();
            res.add(temp.val);
            // 把子节点逆序入栈
            Collections.reverse(temp.children);
            for(Node node:temp.children){
                stack.push(node);
            }
        }

        return res;

    }
}

N叉树的前序遍历（dfs）

class Node {
    public int val;
    public List<Node> children;

    public Node() {}

    public Node(int _val) {
        val = _val;
    }

    public Node(int _val, List<Node> _children) {
        val = _val;
        children = _children;
    }
}

class Solution {
    List<Integer> res = new ArrayList<>();
    public List<Integer> postorder(Node root) {
        dfs(root);
        return res;

    }
    public void dfs(Node root){
        if(root == null){
            return;
        }
        for(Node n:root.children){
            dfs(n);
        }
        res.add(root.val);
    }
}

N叉树的后序遍历（迭代）

class Node {
    public int val;
    public List<Node> children;

    public Node() {}

    public Node(int _val) {
        val = _val;
    }

    public Node(int _val, List<Node> _children) {
        val = _val;
        children = _children;
    }
}

class Solution {
    List<Integer> res = new ArrayList<>();
    public List<Integer> postorder(Node root) {
        if(root == null){
            return res;
        }
        method(root);
        Collections.reverse(res);
        return res;

    }
    // 迭代
    public void method(Node root){
        Stack<Node> stack = new Stack<>();
        stack.push(root);
        while(!stack.isEmpty()){
            Node temp = stack.pop();
            res.add(temp.val);
            for(Node n:temp.children){
                stack.push(n);
            }
        }
    }
}

N叉树的后序遍历（dfs）

class Node {
    public int val;
    public List<Node> children;

    public Node() {}

    public Node(int _val) {
        val = _val;
    }

    public Node(int _val, List<Node> _children) {
        val = _val;
        children = _children;
    }
}

class Solution {
    List<Integer> res = new ArrayList<>();
    public List<Integer> postorder(Node root) {
        if(root == null){
            return res;
        }
        method(root);
        Collections.reverse(res);
        return res;

    }

    // 递归
    public void dfs(Node root){
        if(root == null){
            return;
        }
        for(Node n:root.children){
            dfs(n);
        }
        res.add(root.val);
    }
 
}

二叉树的前序遍历（迭代）

 public class TreeNode {
      int val;
      TreeNode left;
      TreeNode right;
      TreeNode(int x) { val = x; }
 }
class Solution {
    List<Integer> res = new ArrayList<>();
    public List<Integer> preorderTraversal(TreeNode root) {
        Stack<TreeNode> stack = new Stack<>();
        if(root == null){
            return res;
        }
        stack.push(root);
        while(!stack.isEmpty()){
            TreeNode node = stack.pop();
            res.add(node.val);
            if(node.right != null){
                stack.push(node.right);
            }
            if(node.left != null){
                stack.push(node.left);
            }
        }
        return res;
    }
}

二叉树的中序遍历（迭代）

class Solution {
    public List<Integer> inorderTraversal(TreeNode root) {
        List<Integer> list = new ArrayList<>();
        Stack<TreeNode> stack = new Stack<>();
        if(root == null){
            return list;
        }
        TreeNode node = root;
        while(!stack.isEmpty() || node != null){

            // 中序遍历左中右
            // 先把左子树节入栈
            while(node != null){
                stack.push(node);
                node = node.left;
            }

            TreeNode temp = stack.pop();
            // 中
            list.add(temp.val);
            // 右
            node = temp.right;

        }
        return list;
    }
}

二叉树的后序遍历迭代

public List<Integer> postorderTraversal(TreeNode root) {
        LinkedList<Integer> result = new LinkedList<>();
        Stack<TreeNode> stack = new Stack<>();
        while (root != null || !stack.isEmpty()) {
            if (root != null) {
                stack.push(root);
                result.addFirst(root.val);
                root = root.right;
            } else {
                root = stack.pop();
                root = root.left;
            }
        }
        return result;
    }

entry.title: 牛客编程题BST判定
entry.content:
判断给定的二叉树是否为二分查找树

import java.util.*;
public class Main{

    static boolean res = true;
    static int pre = Integer.MIN_VALUE;

    public static void main(String[] args){
        Scanner sc = new Scanner(System.in);
        int head = Integer.parseInt(sc.nextLine());
        TreeNode root = new TreeNode(head);
        Map<Integer,TreeNode> map = new HashMap<>();
        map.put(head, root);
        // 输入并且创建二叉树
        while(sc.hasNextLine()){
            String[] temp = sc.nextLine().split(":");
            String[] temp1 = temp[1].split("[|]");
            int a = Integer.parseInt(temp[0]);    					// 节点值
            int b = Integer.parseInt(temp1[0]);                     // 左子树节点值
            int c = Integer.parseInt(temp1[1]);                     // 右子树节点的值
            if (b != -1){
                map.put(b, new TreeNode(b));
            }
            if (c != -1){
                map.put(c,new TreeNode(c));
            }

            map.get(a).left = map.get(b);
            map.get(a).right = map.get(c);
        }

        method(root);

        if (res == true){
            System.out.println("1");
        }else{
            System.out.println("0");
        }


    }

    // 判断二叉树是否是二叉树查找树（中序遍历和前一个比大小）
    public static void method(TreeNode root){
        if (root == null){
            return;
        }
        method(root.left);

        if (pre >= root.val){
            res = false;
        }
        pre = root.val;

        method(root.right);
    }
}

class TreeNode{
    int val;
    TreeNode left;
    TreeNode right;
    public TreeNode(int val){
        this.val = val;
    }

}

entry.title: LeetCode: 31.下一个排列
entry.content:
思路：

class Solution {
    public void nextPermutation(int[] nums) {
        if(nums.length == 0 || nums.length == 1){
            return;
        }
        int i = nums.length - 2;
        int j = nums.length - 1;
        int k = nums.length - 1;
        // 查找第一个升序序列
        while(i >= 0){
            if(nums[i] >= nums[j]){
                i--;
                j--;
            }else{
                break;
            }
        }
        // 根据条件进行交换
        if(i >= 0){
            while(nums[i] >= nums[k]){
                k--;
            }
            int t = nums[i];
            nums[i] = nums[k];
            nums[k] = t;
        }
        Arrays.sort(nums,j,nums.length);

    }
}

算法题：给定任意一个自然数，获取它重新排列后，下一个比它大的自然数

public class Problem031 {

    public static void main(String[] args) {

        int n = 1243;
        int length = String.valueOf(n).length();
        int[] nums = new int[length];
        // 把自然数分割成一个一个的数字
        while (n != 0) {
            nums[--length] = n % 10;
            n = n / 10;
        }
        for (int num : nums) {
            System.out.println(num);
        }

        System.out.println("======================");
        method(nums);

        for (int num : nums) {
            System.out.println(num);
        }

    }

    public static void method(int[] nums) {
        if (nums.length == 0 || nums.length == 1) {
            return;
        }
        int i = nums.length - 2;
        int j = nums.length - 1;
        int k = nums.length - 1;
        // 查找第一个连续递增序列（2个数的序列）
        while (i >= 0) {
            if (nums[i] >= nums[j]) {
                i--;
                j--;
            } else {
                break;
            }
        }
        if (i >= 0) {
            while (nums[i] > nums[k]) {
                k--;
            }
            // 进行交换
            int t = nums[i];
            nums[i] = nums[k];
            nums[k] = t;
        }
        // 把后半段进行从小到大排序
        Arrays.sort(nums, j, nums.length);
    }
}

entry.title: 快速排序
entry.content:
private void quickSort(int[] nums, int start, int end){
        if (start >= end) {
            return;
        }
        int i = start;
        int j = end;
        int key = nums[i];
        while (i < j) {
            while (i < j && nums[j] >= key) {
                j--;
            }
            nums[i] = nums[j];
            while (i < j && nums[i] <= key) {
                i++;
            }
            nums[j] = nums[i];
        }
        nums[i] = key;
        quickSort(nums, start, i - 1);
        quickSort(nums, i + 1, end);
    }
    ```

entry.title: 实现简陋版本的HashMap
entry.content:
非泛型

// HashMap中存储的节点类型
public class Node {

    int hash;
    Object key;
    Object value;
    Node next;
}

// 实现类
public class MyHash01 {

    public static int LENGTH = 16;


    Node[] table;       // 位桶数组
    int size;           // 存放的键值对个数

    public MyHash01() {
        // 长度一般要是2的整数次幂
        table = new Node[LENGTH];
    }

    @Override
    public String toString() {
        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder("{");
        for (Node node : table) {
            while (node != null){
                sb.append(node.key + ":" + node.value + ",");
                node = node.next;
            }
        }
        sb.setCharAt(sb.length()-1, '}');
        return sb.toString();
    }


    public Object get(Object key){
        int hash = this.hash(key.hashCode(), table.length);
        if (table[hash] != null){
            Node temp = table[hash];
            while (temp != null){
                if (temp.key.equals(key)){
                    // 如果两个key相等，就查找到了
                    System.out.println("查找到了:"+temp.value);
                    return temp.value;
                }else {
                    temp = temp.next;
                }
            }
        }
        return null;
    }


    public void put(Object key, Object value){

        /**
         * TODO：数组扩容
         */

        Node node = new Node();
        node.hash = this.hash(key.hashCode(), table.length);
        node.key = key;
        node.value = value;
        node.next = null;

        Node temp = table[node.hash];
        Node lastNode = null;
        // 如果此节点为空，直接添加
        if (temp == null){
            table[node.hash] = node;
            size++;
        }else {
            // 如果此节点已经有了值，就遍历对应的链表
            while (temp != null){
                // key重复就覆盖value
                if (temp.key.equals(key)){
                    System.out.println("key已经存在");
                    temp.value = value;
                    return;
                }else {
                    // key不重复
                    // 把最后一个结点的地址保存下来
                    if (temp.next == null){
                        lastNode = temp;
                    }
                    temp = temp.next;
                }
            }
            // 把要添加的节点赋值到链表的最后
            lastNode.next = node;
            size++;
        }
    }

    public int hash(int v,int length){
        System.out.println("hash:" + (v&(length - 1)));
        return v&(length - 1);
    }

    public static void main(String[] args) {

        MyHash01 myHash01 = new MyHash01();

        myHash01.put(53, "aaa");
        myHash01.put(69, "bbb");
        myHash01.put(85, "ccc");
        myHash01.get(85);
        System.out.println("size:" + myHash01.size);
        System.out.println(myHash01.toString());
//        System.out.println("结束");
    }
}

泛型版本

public class Node1<K,V> {
    int hash;
    K key;
    V value;
    Node1 next;
}

public class MyHash02<K,V> {
    public static int LENGTH = 16;


    Node1<K,V>[] table;       // 位桶数组
    int size;           // 存放的键值对个数

    public MyHash02() {
        // 长度一般要是2的整数次幂
        table = new Node1[LENGTH];
    }

    @Override
    public String toString() {
        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder("{");
        for (Node1 Node1 : table) {
            while (Node1 != null){
                sb.append(Node1.key + ":" + Node1.value + ",");
                Node1 = Node1.next;
            }
        }
        sb.setCharAt(sb.length()-1, '}');
        return sb.toString();
    }


    public V get(K key){
        int hash = this.hash(key.hashCode(), table.length);
        if (table[hash] != null){
            Node1 temp = table[hash];
            while (temp != null){
                if (temp.key.equals(key)){
                    // 如果两个key相等，就查找到了
                    System.out.println("查找到了:"+temp.value);
                    return (V)temp.value;
                }else {
                    temp = temp.next;
                }
            }
        }
        return null;
    }


    public void put(K key, V value){


        /**
         * TODO：数组扩容
         */

        Node1 node1 = new Node1();
        node1.hash = this.hash(key.hashCode(), table.length);
        node1.key = key;
        node1.value = value;
        node1.next = null;

        Node1 temp = table[node1.hash];
        Node1 lastNode1 = null;
        // 如果此节点为空，直接添加
        if (temp == null){
            table[node1.hash] = node1;
            size++;
        }else {
            // 如果此节点已经有了值，就遍历对应的链表
            while (temp != null){
                // key重复就覆盖value
                if (temp.key.equals(key)){
                    System.out.println("key已经存在");
                    temp.value = value;
                    return;
                }else {
                    // key不重复
                    // 把最后一个结点的地址保存下来
                    if (temp.next == null){
                        lastNode1 = temp;
                    }
                    temp = temp.next;
                }
            }
            // 把要添加的节点赋值到链表的最后
            lastNode1.next = node1;
            size++;
        }
    }

    public int hash(int v,int length){
        System.out.println("hash:" + (v&(length - 1)));
        return v&(length - 1);
    }

    public static void main(String[] args) {

        MyHash02<Integer,String> myHash02 = new MyHash02<>();

        myHash02.put(54, "aaa");
        myHash02.put(65, "bbb");
        myHash02.put(88, "xxx");
        myHash02.get(88);
        System.out.println("size:" + myHash02.size);
        System.out.println(myHash02.toString());
//        System.out.println("结束");
    }
}

entry.title: 线程池简单学习
entry.content:
线程池介绍

新手也能看懂的线程池学习总结

线程池测试：首先定义任务（实现Runnable接口）
public class MyRunnable implements Runnable {

    private String command;

    public MyRunnable(String s) {
        this.command = s;
    }

    @Override
    public void run() {
        System.out.println(Thread.currentThread().getName() + " Start. Time = " + new Date());
        processCommand();
        System.out.println(Thread.currentThread().getName() + " End. Time = " + new Date());
    }

    private void processCommand() {
        try {
            Thread.sleep(5000);
        } catch (InterruptedException e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
    }


    @Override
    public String toString() {
        return this.command;
    }
}
编写测试类
public class Demo {

    private static final int CORE_POOL_SIZE = 5;	// 核心线程数线程数定义了最小可以同时运行的线程数量。
    private static final int MAX_POOL_SIZE = 10;	// 当队列中存放的任务达到队列容量的时候，当前可以同时运行的线程数量变为最大线程数。
    private static final int QUEUE_CAPACITY = 100;	// 当新任务来的时候会先判断当前运行的线程数量是否达到核心线程数，如果达到的话，信任就会被存放在队列中。
    private static final long KEEP_ALIVE_TIME = 1L;	// 当线程数大于核心线程数时，多余的空闲线程存活的最长时间

    public static void main(String[] args) {

        ThreadPoolExecutor executor = new ThreadPoolExecutor(
                CORE_POOL_SIZE,
                MAX_POOL_SIZE,
                KEEP_ALIVE_TIME,
                TimeUnit.SECONDS,
                new ArrayBlockingQueue<>(QUEUE_CAPACITY),
                new ThreadPoolExecutor.CallerRunsPolicy()
        );

        for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
            // 创建任务
            Runnable worker = new MyRunnable("" + i);
            // 执行任务

            executor.execute(worker);
        }

        // 终止线程
        executor.shutdown();

        while (!executor.isTerminated()){

        }
        System.out.println("结束所有线程");

    }

}
